itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport for flight.

title: NAR PHU VALLEY VIA TERI-LA PASS
description: This epic 27-day journey is one of the most comprehensive wilderness treks in the Himalayas. It combines the restricted valleys of Nar and Phu with the challenging crossing of the Teri-La Pass (5,595m) into the high-altitude desert of Upper Mustang. This trek offers unparalleled isolation, ancient Tibetan culture, and some of the most dramatic mountain scenery in the world.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Fly to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Scenic 20 minute afternoon flight. Relax by the lakeside.

itinerary.title: Fly to Jomsom & trek to Kagbeni
itinerary.desc: Morning flight to Jomsom. Trek to Kagbeni with views of Tukuche and Dhaulagiri.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kagbeni to Chele
itinerary.desc: Follow Kali Gandaki river, climb ridges to Tangbe and steeply to Chele.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chele to Ghiling
itinerary.desc: Visit Rangchung Cave Monastery and descend to Ghiling village.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghiling to Dhakmar
itinerary.desc: Cross Nyi-La Pass and the longest Mani wall in Mustang.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dhakmar to Lo-Manthang
itinerary.desc: Ascend eroded gullies and meadows. Cross Marang-La Pass to the fortress city.

itinerary.title: Exploring the Wall City of Lo-Manthang
itinerary.desc: Full day exploring palaces and fortresses.

itinerary.title: Trek from Lo-Manthang to Yara
itinerary.desc: Cross Lo La and Dhi La passes to reach Yara village.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Luri Cave Monastery
itinerary.desc: Visit the 14th century monastery with white stupas and ancient paintings.

itinerary.title: Trek from Yara to Tangge
itinerary.desc: Steep ascent and descent to Dhechyang Khola and Tangge village.

itinerary.title: Trek from Tangge to Yak Kharka
itinerary.desc: Remote route with temporary huts of yak herders.

itinerary.title: Trek from Yak Kharka to Samena Khola
itinerary.desc: Gentle paced flat terrain along the lively riverbank.

itinerary.title: Trek from Samena Khola to Teri-La BC
itinerary.desc: Upward trail along Yak Khola to the base camp (4630m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Teri-La BC to Teri-La High Camp
itinerary.desc: Climb moraine for unobstructed views of Damodar Himal.

itinerary.title: Trek from Teri-La High Camp to Teri-La Phedi
itinerary.desc: Early start to cross the pass at sunrise. Views of Annapurna and Dhaulagiri.

itinerary.title: Trek from Teri-La Phedi to Labse Khola
itinerary.desc: Downhill track into the flat terrain of Nar Phu Valley.

itinerary.title: Trek from Labse Khola to Yak Kharka
itinerary.desc: Wilderness trek through lush pasturelands used for yaks.

itinerary.title: Trek from Yak Kharka to Nar Gaon
itinerary.desc: 7-hour downhill walk to reach the ancient village of Nar.

itinerary.title: Trek from Nar Gaon to Kyang
itinerary.desc: Downhill trek past Mani walls to the Phu River.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kyang to Phu Gaon
itinerary.desc: Walk past Chortens to Phu Gaon and visit the ancient Lakhang Monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek from Phu Gaon to Meta
itinerary.desc: Cross suspension bridges with views of Lamjung Himal (6893m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Meta to Koto
itinerary.desc: Downhill walk through pine forests and waterfalls.

itinerary.title: Trek from Koto to Dharapani
itinerary.desc: Retrace steps alongside Marsyangdi River.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dharapani to Jagat
itinerary.desc: Descend to Tal and climb through dense forest to Jagat.

itinerary.title: Drive from Jagat to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return to the capital in a private jeep.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Final transfer to international airport.

title: UPPER MUSTANG (TIJI FESTIVAL)
tagline: The Chasing of the Demons Festival
description: Experience the legendary Tiji Festival in the walled city of Lo Manthang. This 21-day journey takes you into the heart of the forbidden kingdom of Upper Mustang to witness a three-day ritual known as 'The Chasing of the Demons'. You will see masked dances by monks, colorful traditional costumes, and ancient rituals aimed at bringing peace and prosperity to the region, all set against the dramatic desert landscape of Mustang.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: 7-hour bus drive. Evening boating on Fewa lake.

itinerary.title: Fly to Jomsom and trek to Kagbeni
itinerary.desc: Morning flight. Trek along Kaligandaki bank with Dhaulagiri views.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kagbeni to Tsaile
itinerary.desc: Walk via Tangbe and Chuksang, crossing the bridge to Tsaile (3100m).

itinerary.title: Trek from Tsaile to Syangmochen
itinerary.desc: Trail through canyons and over Chungsi-La to Ranchung Cave.

itinerary.title: Trek from Syangmochen to Tsarang
itinerary.desc: Cross Tsarang-La pass. See the longest Mani Wall in Mustang.

itinerary.title: Trek from Tsarang to Lo-Manthang
itinerary.desc: Visit Old Palace and Monastery. Reach Lo-La for first view of the walled city.

itinerary.title: Explore Lo-Manthang City & Surrounding Mountains
itinerary.desc: Visit Garphu and Nyaphu Gompas and cave-dwelling structures.

itinerary.title: Trek from Lo-Manthang to Yara
itinerary.desc: Ascend Day-La, descend rocky gullies to Dhi village and cross Kaligandaki.

itinerary.title: The Tiji Festival begins (Day 1)
itinerary.desc: May 31: Ritual dances by monks in the Royal Palace square.

itinerary.title: Second Day of Tiji Festival
itinerary.desc: June 01: Elablorate costumes, masks, and traditional Tibetan ceremonies.

itinerary.title: Third Day of Tiji (End of Festival)
itinerary.desc: June 02: Ceremonial destruction of evil remains and cheers of victory.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dhakmar via Ghar Gompa
itinerary.desc: Walk west terrain to the world's oldest Tibetan monastery (7th century).

itinerary.title: Trek to Somar
itinerary.desc: Trace back to Somar village with missed-out views.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kagbeni
itinerary.desc: Continue the return journey to Kagbeni.

itinerary.title: Trek to Jomsom
itinerary.desc: Final trek through Mustang villages. See traditional weaving.

itinerary.title: Fly to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Scenic morning flight along Kali Gandaki Gorge.

itinerary.title: Trek from Muktinath to Jomsom
itinerary.desc: Drop down to Jharkot and Eklebatti for lunch.

itinerary.title: Fly from Jomsom to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: 20 minute flight. Visit in and around the valley.

itinerary.title: Drive from Pokhara to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Bus drive after breakfast.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport 3 hours before flight.

title: DAMODAR KUNDA
tagline: Pilgrimage to the Sacred Glacial Lakes
description: The Damodar Kunda trek is a holy pilgrimage to the high-altitude sacred lakes situated in the remote Upper Mustang region. These lakes are of great religious significance to Hindus and Buddhists alike. The trek passes through the high-altitude desert of Mustang, crossing several high passes and offering spectacular views of the Damodar Himal and the surrounding peaks.

itinerary.title: Arrive in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Private car transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Guided tour of UNESCO world heritage sites.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: 6 hour drive by tourist bus with countryside views.

itinerary.title: Pokhara fly to Jomsom & trek to Kagbeni
itinerary.desc: 25 min flight and 3-4 hour trek with mountain views.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kagbeni to Chele
itinerary.desc: Trek Tangbe village with narrow alleys and apple orchards.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chele to Syangboche
itinerary.desc: Undulating trails through tremendous canyons with unusual colors.

itinerary.title: Trek from Syangboche to Ghami
itinerary.desc: Climb gently to a 3800m pass with deep valley views.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghami to Charang
itinerary.desc: Cross Ghami Khola and walk past a very long Mani wall.

itinerary.title: Trek from Charang to Lo-Manthang
itinerary.desc: Views of Nilgiri and Tilicho. Cross 3850m windy pass.

itinerary.title: Trek from Yara to Ghuma Thanti via Luri Cave
itinerary.desc: Visit Cave Monastery and cross 5100m pass.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghuma Thanti to Damodar Kunda
itinerary.desc: 10 hour long day crossing 5600m pass to reach high altitude lakes.

itinerary.title: Exploring the high altitude Damodar Kunda/Lake
itinerary.desc: Rest and explore the sacred glacial lakes.

itinerary.title: Trek from Damodar Kunda to Ghuma Thanti
itinerary.desc: 8 hour return trek over 5600m pass.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghuma Thanti to Yara
itinerary.desc: 7 hour descent back to Yara village.

itinerary.title: Trek from Yara to Tangye
itinerary.desc: 8 hour trek through Saligram areas and huge plateaus.

itinerary.title: Trek from Tangya to Tetang
itinerary.desc: 10 hour long trek via Poha with superb views of Nilgiri.

itinerary.title: Trek from Tetang to Muktinath
itinerary.desc: 6 hour walk through Mani walls and water spouts.

itinerary.title: Trek from Muktinath to Jomsom
itinerary.desc: 5 hour walk through Jharkot and Eklebatti.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Fly to Pokhara and return to Kathmandu.

title: KAILASH MANSAROVAR OVERLAND TOUR
description: The Kailash Mansarovar Overland Tour is a profound spiritual journey across the high-altitude Tibetan plateau. It takes you to the holiest mountain in the world, Mt. Kailash, and the sacred Lake Mansarovar. This tour includes the three-day Kailash Kora (circumambulation) crossing the high Dolma La pass (5,630m), offering a life-changing experience for pilgrims and adventure seekers alike.

itinerary.title: Arrive to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Transfer to hotel and detail briefing on the Yatra.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing and free day
itinerary.desc: Visit Pashupatinath and Budanilkantha temples.

itinerary.title: Drive to Syabrubesi (1,700m)
itinerary.desc: 6-7 hour drive to the Nepal-China border.

itinerary.title: Drive to Kyirong (about 47 km)
itinerary.desc: Cross border and complete immigration. Reach Kyirong city.

itinerary.title: Rest day in Kyirong
itinerary.desc: Acclimatization day. Visit market hill side.

itinerary.title: Drive to Dongba via Saga (4,500m)
itinerary.desc: 8 hour drive crossing Lalung La pass (5,300m).

itinerary.title: Drive to Chui Gompa (4,500m)
itinerary.desc: 7 hour drive to the bank of Lake Mansarovar. Darshan of the lake.

itinerary.title: Drive to Darchen (4600m)
itinerary.desc: Puja, Hawan, and Holy bath. Parikrama of Lake Mansarovar.

itinerary.title: Trek to Deraphuk (4,890m)
itinerary.desc: First day of Parikrama. 6-7 hour continuous walk.

itinerary.title: Trek to Zhutulphuk Gompa (4,790m)
itinerary.desc: Sensitive day crossing Doma-La Pass (5,600m). Darshan of Gaurikunda.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Dongba (4,500m)
itinerary.desc: Finish Parikrama (3 hrs) and drive towards Dongba.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kyirong (3,600m)
itinerary.desc: Return drive via Saga with break at Brahmaputra river.

itinerary.title: Drive to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: 7 hour drive back to the capital through the border.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport for departure flight.

title: BUDDHIST PILGRIMAGE TREKKING
tagline: A Spiritual Journey Through Sacred Sites
description: This 19-day pilgrimage trek is a deeply spiritual journey through some of the most sacred Buddhist sites in Nepal. It combines visits to famous temples like Haleshi Mahadev (venerated by both Hindus and Buddhists) with ancient monasteries in the lower Solukhumbu region. You will experience the vibrant culture of Buddhist communities, witness traditional rituals, and trek through beautiful landscapes reflecting human efforts in the course of civilization.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome and transfer to hotel. Overnight in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Drive to Lamidanda and trek to Halesi
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek to Haleshi Mahadev Temple. Explore cave and Maratika Monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek from Halesi to Kharpa
itinerary.desc: 4-5 hour trek through Arkhaule and Lamidanda villages.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kharpa to Dumre
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek along Rawa Khola to Dumre Dharapani.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dumre to Harishe
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek meeting the old Haleshi-Phaplu route at Aishelukharka.

itinerary.title: Trek from Harishe to Kurima
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek to Bagor. Visit the monastery at Diyale.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kurima to Chitre
itinerary.desc: 6 hour trek along the GHT Sub Trail to the village with two monasteries.

itinerary.title: Trek from Chitre to Dimbul
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek through Dhodre to reach Dimbul. Scenic beauty of lower Solu.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dimbul to Nirkum
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek. Visit the monastery and learn about local topography.

itinerary.title: Trek from Nirkum to Shyare
itinerary.desc: 5 hour trek targeting the best possible site around the village monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek from Shyare to Bung
itinerary.desc: 6 hour trek through a vibrant atmosphere created by human influence.

itinerary.title: Trek from Bung to Khiraule
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek to a village rich in rhododendron and ancient monasteries.

itinerary.title: Trek from Khiraule to Cherem
itinerary.desc: 5 hour trek passing through Mani walls reflecting ancient civilization.

itinerary.title: Trek from Cherem to Kharikhola
itinerary.desc: 5-6 hour trek joining the popular Jiri-Everest route.

itinerary.title: Trek from Kharikhola to Takshindu
itinerary.desc: 5 hour trek with magnificent views of Kusum Kangaru.

itinerary.title: Trek to Thupten Choling
itinerary.desc: 6 hour trek through Ringmo to the large Sherpa settlement and monastery.

itinerary.title: Trek from Thupten Choling to Phaplu
itinerary.desc: Descend to Junbeshi village and visit the monastery before reaching Phaplu.

itinerary.title: Drive from Phaplu to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Morning drive back to the capital by sharing jeep.

itinerary.title: Transfer to International Airport
itinerary.desc: Final transfer for your flight home.

title: GREAT HIMALAYAN TRAIL
highlights: Traverse the entire length of the Nepalese Himalayas
Cross numerous high-altitude passes above 5,000m
Experience diverse cultures, landscapes, and ecosystems
The ultimate mountaineering and trekking challenge
description: The Great Himalayan Trail is one of the longest and highest walking trails in the world. Winding through the tallest mountain ranges and most isolated communities, it offers an unparalleled adventure for the truly dedicated trekker.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Kanchenjunga Base Camp
itinerary.desc: Kathmandu to Kanchenjunga Base Camp (KBC) at Pangpema.

itinerary.title: KBC to Hongon
itinerary.desc: KBC over the Nango La and Lumbha Sambha to Hongon.

itinerary.title: Hongon to Makalu Base Camp
itinerary.desc: Hongon to Makalu Base Camp (MBC) via some wilderness trails.

itinerary.title: MBC to Chhukung
itinerary.desc: From MBC cross the High Passes to Chhukung in the Everest region.

itinerary.title: Cross Everest Region
itinerary.desc: Cross the Everest Region via the Cho La and Renjo La.

itinerary.title: Thame to Simi
itinerary.desc: From Thame, cross the Tashi Labsta and descend to Simi.

itinerary.title: Rolwaling to The Last Resort
itinerary.desc: Head through the lower Rolwaling to The Last Resort.

itinerary.title: Tilman’s Pass to Syabru Besi
itinerary.desc: Cross Tilman’s Pass and descend through Langtang to Syabru Besi.

itinerary.title: Ruby Valley to Machhakhola
itinerary.desc: Trek through the Ruby Valley to Machhakhola.

itinerary.title: Manaslu Circuit to Dharapani
itinerary.desc: Head around the Manaslu Circuit to Dharapani.

itinerary.title: Annapurna Circuit to Kagbeni
itinerary.desc: Enjoy some easy trails on the Annapurna Circuit to Kagbeni.

itinerary.title: Upper Dolpo to Phoksumdo Lake
itinerary.desc: Enter Upper Dolpo and cross to Ringmo at Phoksumdo Lake.

itinerary.title: Upper Dolpo to Upper Mugu
itinerary.desc: The Upper Dolpo to Upper Mugu wild traverse.

itinerary.title: Mugu to Hilsa
itinerary.desc: Trek through Mugu and Humla to the border with Tibet at Hilsa.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return to Kathmandu.

title: WESTERN NEPAL TO KAILASH TIBET TREK
tagline: An Epic Journey from Limi Valley to the Sacred Mountain
highlights: Trek through the remote and untouched Limi Valley in Western Nepal
Cross the Nepal-Tibet border at Hilsa on foot
Perform the ultimate Kailash Kora (circumambulation)
Explore the ancient cities of Lhasa, Shigatse, and Gyantse
description: A remarkable cross-border adventure that begins with a trek through the wild and remote trails of Western Nepal, crossing into Tibet to perform the sacred Kailash Kora, and culminating with a cultural tour of Lhasa.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Today upon your arrival we will come to pick up you on the airport and drop you to your booked Hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu day tour and chinese Visa process
itinerary.desc: You will have sightseeing of world heritage sites in Kathmandu valley like Boudhanath, Pashupatinath and Swyambhunath. In the evening you will obtain the Chinese visa and make a preparation for your Trip.

itinerary.title: Fly to Nepalgunj
itinerary.desc: Today, afternoon, we will take a 55 minute flight to Nepalgunj. Overnight at Hotel.

itinerary.title: Fly to Simikot (2960m) and Trek to Dharapuri(2300m)
itinerary.desc: In the early morning after breakfast, we will fly for about 45 minutes to Simikot. After reaching Simikot we will have local tea at simikot sun valley Resort. Then we will start our trek to Dharapuri. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: Trek to Salli Khola (2700m)
itinerary.desc: We will follow the river to a waterfall near at Chachera. We then climb over a ridge and bypass the village of Kermi. After walking through a sparse pine forest we descend from the ridge to the Salli Khola and camp near the river.

itinerary.title: Trek to Muchu (2920m)
itinerary.desc: We cross the Karnali river and climb over a rocky ridge before descending to the waters of the Humla Karnali. After crossing another ridge we come to a sandy meadow. We finally reach Muchu where we have a camp night.

itinerary.title: Trek to Sipsip (4330m)
itinerary.desc: We follow the trail over a ridge to the Tumkot Khola and then walk along the rocky stream bed for a short distance before beginning a steep climb through a rock-filled gully. We pass through Palbang and its bright yellow mustard fields to the small settlement of Yari and beyond here the route climbs up the valley towards a pass, the Nara Lagna. We camp below the pass in a meadow known as Sipsip. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: Trek to Hilsa (3720m)
itinerary.desc: From Sipsip we ascend steeply to a rock cairn marking the top of the Nara Lagna (4580m). Descending from the pass, we have views of the Tibetan Plateau before arriving at the village of Ranipauwa. Beyond here, we slip and slide on a surface of loose pebbles down to the Humla Karnali. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: Drive to Taklakot (3930m) and rive to Manasarovar (4560m)
itinerary.desc: Shortly after crossing the Nepal/Tibet border, we will meet our transport and drive towards Manasarovar, the most venerated of Tibet's many lakes. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: At Manasarovar
itinerary.desc: Today we will take acclimatization day at Manasarovar. We will explore the fascinating place. We will visit the picturesque Chiu Monastery on the north-west shore of the lake with the imposing sight of Mt Kailash in the background. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: Drive to Tarboche (4750m)
itinerary.desc: We drive for about 35 km towards Mt Kailash and Tarboche. This is the starting point for our Kora, the 53 km trek around the mountain. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dirapuk (4900m)
itinerary.desc: From Tarboche, we walk up the Lha Chu Valley through beautiful green meadows and streams with Mt Kailash towering above us. We follow the river which enters a narrow canyon with high, steep cliffs and spectacular waterfalls. Continuing up the valley, the north face of Kailash comes into view before we reach the ancient monastery at Dirapuk. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: Trek to Zutulpuk (4790m)
itinerary.desc: We now leave the Lha Chu Valley and enter the Drolma Chu Valley, heading up towards a high pass, the Drolma La (5630m). It is a tough climb to the summit which is festooned with prayer flags but from there it is all downhill or flat to Zutul-puk, with views of one of the highest lakes in the world, Thukpe Dzingbu Lake, known as the Lake of Compassion. At Zutul-puk, there is a monastery and several meditation caves and a cave containing an image of Milarepa. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: Trek to Darchen (4560m)
itinerary.desc: On the final day of the Kora we cross several streams, and follow an impressive gorge. Along the way we are once again treated to magnificent views of Kailash. We then enter the Bharka plain and it is about an hour walk through this desert-like landscape to Darchen. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: Drive to Paryang (4750m)
itinerary.desc: Today we will drive to Paryang, crossing the Mayun-la and several river crossings. The scenery along this section is one of the most panoramic of the entire journey. Overnight at tented camp.

itinerary.title: Drive to Saga (4600m)
itinerary.desc: We continue driving towards Saga, passing through the Zhongba town. Overnight at tented camp near Bhramaputra River.

itinerary.title: Drive to Shigatse (3900m)
itinerary.desc: Leaving Saga, we pass the turn-off for the northern route and skirt around a lake, passing through a series of valleys. We continue on to Lhatse and follow it for the final 150km to Shigatse, the second largest city in Tibet. Overnight at hotel.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing and drive to Gyantse (3950m)
itinerary.desc: Early morning, we will have a tour around Tashilhunpo Monastery, one of the largest monasteries in Tibet and we will start our drive towards Gyantse. After reaching Gyantse, we began to explore the Pelkor Chode Monastery and the Gyantse Kumbum. Overnight at hotel.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing and drive to Lhasa (3650m)
itinerary.desc: We will have a scenic drive towards Lhasa. We can have an eye-catching view of huge glacier. On our drive we will cross Khamba La with a beautiful nature view and continue on to Lhasa. Overnight at hotel.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing in Lhasa
itinerary.desc: We will visit many monasteries in Lhasa. we will visit the Norbulingka, the summer palace of the Dalai Lama, as well as the Jokhang Temple. Overnight at hotel.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing in Lhasa
itinerary.desc: Today we will visit Potala Palace after Lunch and also visit Drepung Monastery. Overnight at hotel.

itinerary.title: Lhasa to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Today you will fly back to Kathmandu. You will drive to Gonggar airport in time to catch your flight. Overnight at Hotel.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: We will drop you to the Kathmandu Airport for your departure 3 hours before your flight.
